---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do, and what gets in the way? Describe the problem before the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else: examples, mockups, related tools, or how you would use this.
